dispatch: Rescue Trail Tac 8 Snoqualmie Battalion 171 Engine 171 8171 Mount Si trailhead Southeast Mount Si Road Rescue Trail Tac 8 Snoqualmie Battalion 171 Engine 171 8171 Mount Si trailhead 1402 Hours

tac.text: 8171 Battalion 171 on scene at the Mount Sai trailhead. We have a hiker with a lower leg injury approximately three miles up the trail, patient is unable to walk out.
171 to dispatch, given the location and terrain this is going to be a carry-out. We're notifying Search and Rescue. Requesting King County SAR to respond.
Copy 171, King County Search and Rescue has been notified and is responding to the Mount Si trailhead.
171, patient is stable and packaged. We will stage at the trailhead until SAR arrives to assist with the carry-out.
